message:
feat(linalg): implement Cholesky, TriangularSolve, QR, SVD, and Eigh primitives

- Add fj-lax/src/linalg.rs with full CPU implementations of Cholesky
  decomposition, triangular solve (forward/back substitution), Householder
  QR factorization, Golub-Kahan SVD, and symmetric eigendecomposition (Eigh)
- Implement VJP (reverse-mode) and JVP (forward-mode) differentiation rules
  for Cholesky and TriangularSolve in fj-ad, including matrix helper utilities
  (matmul, transpose, tril, symmetrize, extract/build matrix)
- Add eval_primitive_multi() API in fj-lax for multi-output primitives (QR
  returns [Q,R], SVD returns [U,S,Vt], Eigh returns [W,V])
- Update fj-backend-cpu executor to handle multi-output equations via
  evaluate_equation_multi(), removing the single-output-only restriction
  in the parallel evaluator
- Add ProgramSpec variants and Jaxpr builders for Conv1dValid,
  ScatterOverwrite, Cholesky, TriangularSolve, QR, SVD, Eigh in fj-core
- Add corresponding FixtureProgram variants in fj-conformance
- Add conformance fixtures: conv1d, scatter, cholesky, triangular_solve,
  QR, SVD, Eigh test cases in legacy_transform_cases.v1.json
- Fix conj fixture: complex128(5+0i) → complex128(5+3i) for non-trivial test
- Simplify conformance test assertion to use report.mismatched_cases
- Update stub tests to verify implemented primitives reject scalar input
  gracefully; only FFT primitives remain as V2 stubs

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
